forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KXX44VAM0BR1CM0D7JR9C8XP
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8980'
+title: 'DocCoverageTests: fail on undocumented public API'
+---
+## What
+Adopt the family's doc-coverage convention (see `FoundationModelsShelltool`'s `DocCoverageTests` and its Package.swift comments): a test that parses every source file under `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras` with SwiftSyntax and fails on any undocumented `public` declaration.
+
+- Add `swift-syntax` (`SwiftSyntax` + `SwiftParser` products) to the **test target only** â€” test-only tooling, does not count against the plan.md Â§5 runtime dependency budget (Foundation + Stencil), matching how Shelltool declares it.
+- Port/adapt the sibling's scanner: `Tests/FoundationModelsExtrasTests/DocCoverageTests.swift`.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `swift test` fails if a `public` declaration in `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras` lacks a doc comment (verified during development by temporarily stripping one)
+- [ ] swift-syntax appears only in the test target's dependencies
+- [ ] Passes against the current public surface
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `DocCoverageTests.swift` is itself the test; run `swift test`, expect pass
+- [ ] Regression check embedded in the test file: the scanner reports a violation for an in-memory source snippet with an undocumented public decl (proves the scanner works, not just that the tree is clean)
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -6,19 +6,18 @@
 title: 'DocCoverageTests: fail on undocumented public API'
 ---
 ## What
-Adopt the family's doc-coverage convention (see `FoundationModelsShelltool`'s `DocCoverageTests` and its Package.swift comments): a test that parses every source file under `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras` with SwiftSyntax and fails on any undocumented `public` declaration.
+Adopt the family's doc-coverage convention (see `FoundationModelsShelltool`'s `DocCoverageTests` and its Package.swift comments): a test that parses every source file under `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras` with SwiftSyntax and fails on any undocumented `public` declaration. Note: this is family convention, not plan.md scope â€” kept because every sibling package enforces it.

 - Add `swift-syntax` (`SwiftSyntax` + `SwiftParser` products) to the **test target only** â€” test-only tooling, does not count against the plan.md Â§5 runtime dependency budget (Foundation + Stencil), matching how Shelltool declares it.
 - Port/adapt the sibling's scanner: `Tests/FoundationModelsExtrasTests/DocCoverageTests.swift`.

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `swift test` fails if a `public` declaration in `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras` lacks a doc comment (verified during development by temporarily stripping one)
+- [ ] The scanner reports a violation for an in-memory source snippet containing an undocumented public declaration (automated regression check embedded in the test â€” proves the scanner works, not just that the tree is clean)
+- [ ] The scanner reports zero violations for `Sources/FoundationModelsExtras` (the tree is actually documented)
 - [ ] swift-syntax appears only in the test target's dependencies
-- [ ] Passes against the current public surface

 ## Tests
 - [ ] `DocCoverageTests.swift` is itself the test; run `swift test`, expect pass
-- [ ] Regression check embedded in the test file: the scanner reports a violation for an in-memory source snippet with an undocumented public decl (proves the scanner works, not just that the tree is clean)

 ## Workflow
 - Use `/tdd` â€” write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file

+
+    - Package.swift: added swift-syntax dependency (from "604.0.0-latest"), with SwiftSyntax + SwiftParser products declared only in the testTarget's dependencies. Main library target still depends only on Stencil.
+    - Tests/FoundationModelsExtrasTests/DocCoverageTests.swift: ported DocCoverageScanner (SwiftSyntax visitor) + integration test scanning Sources/FoundationModelsExtras, plus the path-escape-throws test.
+    - Tests/FoundationModelsExtrasTests/DocCoverageScannerTests.swift: ported unit/regression tests against synthetic fixtures (documented/undocumented struct, function, init, actor, enum case inside public enum, blank-line-separated doc comment, attribute-attached doc comment).
+    - Tests/FoundationModelsExtrasTests/PackageRootValidation.swift: ported path-containment helper, adjusted to this package's Tests/FoundationModelsExtrasTests directory depth (still three levels up to package root).
+
+    TDD: wrote DocCoverageScannerTests.swift first referencing the not-yet-existing DocCoverageScanner, ran swift test, confirmed compile failure (cannot find 'DocCoverageScanner' in scope), then added the scanner + remaining test files. Full suite now green: 46/46 tests pass, zero warnings on swift build.
